scope.summary: Bound server and driver fuzz work across explicit shards and make driver release-qualification prep execute and aggregate the same quality graph as strict mode.
out_of_scope: Changing individual fuzz-target semantics or reducing their configured target-time budgets.
Claiming that an external GitHub Actions fuzz or release-qualification run executed at this source SHA.

entry_points.name: server scheduled fuzz campaign
entry_points.trace: .github/workflows/fuzz.yml defines five independent crate/target jobs, each with an explicit 300-second target budget, 20-minute job cap, isolated fuzz cache key, and crash/timeout upload; python3 scripts/ci_taxonomy.py --check passed.

entry_points.name: driver quality fuzz matrix
entry_points.trace: The checksum-verified cross-repo handoff records rust-oracledb commit 4f1eb3abd3af604ad29f1899251025499b0a3869: concrete shards 0,1,2,3 retain the 120-second release/soak target budget and cache the standalone fuzz workspace.

entry_points.name: driver release-qualification prep
entry_points.trace: At driver commit 4f1eb3abd3af604ad29f1899251025499b0a3869, python3 scripts/verify_required_local.py --self-test passed the prep/strict graph, complete prep-result aggregation including fuzz-0 through fuzz-3, and strict-only evidence negative controls.

entry_points.name: cross-repo checksum handoff
entry_points.trace: tests/artifacts/evidence/oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.5.4-driver-handoff.json binds both repository commit/tree SHAs and SHA-256 digests for every D4 delivery path; an independent local verifier recomputed all values successfully.

limitations: No external GitHub Actions fuzz or release-qualification run is claimed; this close is based on the checked workflow/parser contracts.
The driver's full workspace compile graph was not rerun because its mandatory Agent Mail build-slot service was unavailable; no unleased full build was substituted.
This close has no required-proof/v1 artifact and remains not-ready on scoped workflow tests.
